title: Neeyum Bommai Lyics Moodar Koodam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Neeyum Bommai
Singer: K.J.Yesudas
Music:Natarajan Shankaran
Movie: Moodar Koodam

Neeyum bommai naanum bommai
nenachu paarthaa ellaam bommai
thayin madiyil pillayum bommai
thalaivan munnay thondanum bommai
kovilil vazhum dheivamum bommai
adhai kumbidum manidhar yaavarum bommai

Neeyum bommai naanum bommai
nenachu paarthaa ellaam bommai

Vallavan kaiyil nallavan bommai
ullavan mun illadhavan bommai (2)
allum pagalum uzhaipavan bommai
dhinam allal pattu azhaibavan bommai

anbin anaippil annaivarum bommai
aasai vaarthaiyil arivum bommai (2)
inbacholayil iyarkai bommai
andha iyarkai ammaipil edhuvumey bommai

Neeyum bommai naanum bommai
nenachu paarthaa ellaam bommai
vidhiyil paarvayil uyirgal bommai
veesum puyalil ulagamey bommai
nadhiyin munnay dharmamum bommai
varum saavin pidiyil vazhvum bommai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Neeyum Bommai?

The song reflects on the beauty of life and relationships, portraying a sense of nostalgia and warmth.

What is the plot context of the movie Moodar Koodam?

The movie revolves around the lives of three friends and their adventures, highlighting themes of friendship and life's challenges.

Who is the singer of Neeyum Bommai?

The song is sung by the legendary K.J.Yesudas, known for his soulful voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for Neeyum Bommai?

The music for the song was composed by Natarajan Shankaran, who is known for his unique style and melodies.

When was Neeyum Bommai released?

The song was released on September 15, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neeyum Bommai, the listener is taken on a heartfelt journey through the lens of nostalgia and warmth. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of life and relationships, making it a perfect companion for moments of reflection. Its soothing melody, delivered by the iconic K.J.Yesudas, evokes deep emotions and resonates with anyone who has cherished memories. This track from Moodar Koodam serves as a reminder of the simple joys and connections that define our lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeyum Bommai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and warmth. With the soulful voice of K.J.Yesudas and the enchanting music by Natarajan Shankaran, this song from the film Moodar Koodam resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the beauty of life and relationships through this captivating track that lingers in your heart.
stanzaMeanings: You and I are like dolls; when I think about it, everything is like a doll. In the mother's lap, the child is a doll, and in front of the leader, there is a doll. In the temple, the god is a doll, and people worship it as a doll.
You and I are like dolls; when I think about it, everything is like a doll.
The good person is in the hands of the capable; the one who is not there is also a doll. Day and night, the hardworking person is a doll, and the one who sings is also a doll.
In the embrace of love, everyone is a doll; in the words of desire, knowledge is a doll. In the natural world, it is a doll, and in that nature, everything is a doll.

You and I are like dolls; when I think about it, everything is like a doll. In the fate and the view of life, there are dolls; in the blowing storm, the world is a doll, and in front of the river, righteousness is a doll, and in the grip of fate, life is a doll.
